summary: 0.6.63 is a plugin-UI and preset-surface slice: reorganize the visible panel, remove the Player prefix from visible labels, add stateful loop and shuffle controls, and add one stored default preset with optional load-at-start behavior.
operatorSignals: The next requested slice was plugin UI revision rather than slideshow.
The operator wanted one panel organized around runtime controls on the left and preset work on the right.
The operator wanted visible Player prefixes removed and loop treated as state rather than action buttons.
actionsTaken: Reorganized the plugin panel rows to reflect the new sketch within the current VaM two-column helper layout.
Replaced visible loop and shuffle action buttons with visible state controls synchronized from attached player state.
Added a stored default preset id plus a Load Default at Start toggle on the existing preset seam.
nonGoals: No transport, slideshow, sync, right-stick volume, or deferred gaze changes in this slice.
No removal of old internal shortcut actions that are still referenced by demo3 or other external surfaces.
